title: Company Names Tribunal decision: Wolverhampton Tree Surgeons Ltd
body: "Application number 5450  Applicant Wolverhampton Tree Service Ltd objected to the name used by Wolverhampton Tree Surgeons Ltd under the Companies Act 2006.  This decision was undefended. ‘Undefended’ refers to decisions where there has been no defence in response to the application to the Company Names Tribunal. "
